rationale: The 2001 Van Heerde et al. paper is cited only as a brief supporting reference when interpreting one empirical finding, where the authors note prior evidence of possible nonmonotonic deal-effect curves. The citing paper does not use that paper's semiparametric approach, measures, or estimation procedure, and instead explicitly builds its dip-estimation setup on Van Heerde et al. (2000). This makes the citation a background corroboration rather than a central conceptual or methodological dependency.
